heading: Sell your gold
intro: When, where, and how you sell your gold determines what's left after tax. Here's an overview of resale rules in the main markets we cover.

switzerland.name: Switzerland
switzerland.keyPoint: Capital gains tax-exempt for individuals on private movable assets

france.name: France
france.threshold: No minimum period, proof of purchase recommended
france.keyPoint: 11.5% flat tax on sale price, unless proof of purchase is retained

germany.name: Germany
germany.keyPoint: Gain fully tax-exempt after a one-year holding period (§23 EStG)

italy.name: Italy
italy.keyPoint: Gain taxed as miscellaneous income, unless under managed savings regime

usa.name: United States
usa.keyPoint: Gain taxed up to 28% federally (collectible classification)
